/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/domain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/geo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/json_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/json_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/map_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/request_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/svg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/transport_catalogue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_catalogue.dir/src/transport_router.cpp.o -o transport_catalogue
